flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Johnson College rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.2k → $15.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 23 pp at Johnson College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (47.1% vs 69.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Johnson College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Johnson College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (60.5% → 74.6%).
